creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 235931
"git diff" to update the port

- Update 1.44 --> 1.45
Changes: https://github.com/whiterabbitsecurity/connector/compare/1.44...1.45
- Respect change of GH_ACCOUNT name for the upstream

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.1-RELEASE-p1
pkg 1.18.3
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_1
openssl 1.1.1o
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
